creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/src/commit/?id=9e7101a856ad738879b0bde099bfb2ba08b7995c

commit 9e7101a856ad738879b0bde099bfb2ba08b7995c

Commit:     Dimitry Andric <dim@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-06-22 18:22:28 +0000

    Merge llvm-project release/16.x llvmorg-16.0.2-0-g18ddebe1a1a9

    This updates llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb and
    openmp to llvmorg-16.0.2-0-g18ddebe1a1a9 (aka 16.0.2 release).

    PR:             271047
    MFC after:      1 month
